title: GLM 5.2 SUPER MODE: Here's HOW TO USE GLM-5.2 to it's FULL POTENTIAL
summary: GLM-5.2 is presented as a major upgrade enabling high-performance code generation tasks. Used in conjunction with Verdent, it can build full applications like a creator sponsorship dashboard from a single prompt, supporting features like data persistence, UI customization, and natural language refinement.
writeup: The video covers GLM-5.2, positioned as a major upgrade over GLM-5.1 with strong performance on coding tasks, and walks through using it to its full potential. The key demonstration pairs the model with Verdent to generate a complete creator sponsorship dashboard from a single prompt, tracking deals, deadlines, invoices, and contacts. The takeaway is that GLM-5.2 can produce a functional multi-feature application through prompt-driven code generation rather than incremental builds.
